chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-228 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 23-05-2024 Petitioner is present in person Mr. Akhtiar Ahmed Heesbani, Advocate for Respondents No.4 & 5 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General a/w Aijaz Ahmed Khuhro, Chairman Town Committee Sobodero.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro,J:- Respondents No.4 and 5 are present, submit that they are ready to give joining to petitioner and subject to his attendance and presence on duty, would issue him salary. They further undertake that petitioner’s period of service from 28.01.2019 till today that according to them he remained absent, but disputed by the petitioner, will be decided in accordance with law either as leave without salary or leave with salary. They further submit that meanwhile documents of the petitioner would be sent for verification to the relevant officers and will further proceed in his matter in the light of report of verification. The petitioner is satisfied, hence this petition is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
